tool_args.label: UKG Kronos System Day-to-Day Managed Support Services
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Headquarters is seeking Board approval to award a competitively negotiated personal service contract to IBM Corporation in the estimated amount of $7,854,856 to provide day-to-day maintenance and technical support services for MTA's existing UKG Workforce Central system and for the new upgraded Kronos Pro Workforce Management system

payload.project_name: UKG Kronos System Day-to-Day Managed Support Services
payload.description: Contract to IBM to provide day-to-day maintenance and technical support services for MTA's UKG Workforce Central system and the new upgraded Kronos Pro Workforce Management system over three years with two 1-year renewal options.

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Headquarters is seeking Board approval to award a competitively negotiated personal service contract to IBM Corporation ("IBM") in the estimated amount of $7,854,856 to provide day-to-day maintenance and technical support services for MTA's existing UKG Workforce Central system and for the new upgraded Kronos Pro Workforce Management system

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: OMNY EU/LU Media Procurement
tool_args.raw_text: Contract for the Procurement of OMNY EU/LU Media: Modification to fulfill media inventory needs for CVM replenishment, CS POS replenishment, DOE new school year, B2B Orders, new pass issuance, and Reduced Fare replenishment for 2026.

payload.description: Modification to contract A-34024 to procure additional OMNY Extended-Use and Limited-Use media for 2026, including EU Media (7,402,000), LU FanFold Media (10,540,000), and LU Die-Cut Media (6,509,800).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Contract A-34024 (the "NFPS Contract"), awarded to Cubic Transportation Systems ("Cubic") provides NYC Transit and the MTA Bus Company ("MTAB") with a New Fare Payment System.
This request is for the procurement of (1) 7,402,000 EU Media; (2) 10,540,000 LU FanFold (LU-F) Media; and (3) 6,509,800 LU Die-Cut ("LU-S") Media, representing the quantities required for 2026.
